title: AN ACT TO AMEND PRIORITY NUMBER FIVE, PAGE TWENTY-EIGHT-B, GROUP III, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2946 / 55 OG No. 35, 7309 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2454, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND PRIORITY NUMBER FIVE, PAGE TWENTY-EIGHT-B, GROUP III, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Priority number five, page twenty-eight-B, Group III, for the Province of Cebu, Appendix B of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is amended to read as follows:

"

5a.

Carcar, TalutâCompletion and painting

P1,000.00

"

5b.

Carcar, PoblacionâRepair, improvement and painting of Central School Home Economics Building

2,500.00

"

5c.

Carcar, ValenciaâCompletion and painting of Home Economics Building

1,500.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
